hook: AI gave me a 7-step plan. I asked for a vibe check.
caption:
AI gave me a 7-step plan. I asked for a vibe check.

You know that feeling when you ask a friend "should I take this job offer" and they just... get it? They know you hate bureaucracy. They know you need creative breathing room. They know that a 15% salary bump means nothing if you're miserable by Tuesday.

AI does the opposite by default.

It gives you a framework. A pros/cons list. Bullet points organized by category. Completely logical. Completely useless for how your brain actually works.

Because the problem was never information. You had the information. You needed someone to think *with* you — the way YOU think.

That's the gap bootfile.ai was built to fix.

Your BootFile tells AI how you process decisions. Whether you need the emotional reality named first before you can hear the logic. Whether you think in systems or in stories. Whether "be direct" means tough love or just skip the filler.

Same question. Completely different conversation.

One of them actually helps.
